# Transformer Inference Mechanics

The hardware chapters explain where the work runs. This chapter explains what
the work is.

## Chapter Job

Explain transformer inference in the terms an infrastructure engineer needs:
prefill, decode, memory movement, KV cache, and batching.

## Core Mechanics

- Tokenization.
- Embedding lookup.
- Transformer block execution.
- Attention.
- MLP.
- Normalization.
- Logits and sampling.
- Prefill phase.
- Decode phase.
- Streaming response.

## Why Prefill and Decode Differ

Prefill processes a prompt in parallel. Decode generates tokens one step at a
time. Their bottlenecks, batching behavior, and memory pressure differ.

## Artifact

The reader creates a prefill/decode timeline for one model serving request.
